rules.title: Access Control: Principle of Least Privilege
rules.text: Systems must enforce least privilege for all user accounts and service principals. Access reviews must occur quarterly.

rules.title: Data Encryption at Rest and in Transit
rules.text: All sensitive data must be encrypted using AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Encryption keys must be rotated every 90 days.

rules.title: Audit Logging and Monitoring
rules.text: All access to sensitive systems must be logged with timestamp, user identity, action performed, and result. Logs must be retained for a minimum of 12 months.

rules.title: Data Subject Rights: Right to Erasure
rules.text: Data controllers must be able to erase personal data on valid request unless legal grounds retain it.

rules.title: Data Processing Consent Requirements
rules.text: Processing of personal data requires explicit, informed consent from the data subject. Consent must be freely given, specific, and unambiguous.

rules.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer Safeguards
rules.text: Transfers of personal data to third countries require adequate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses or Binding Corporate Rules.

rules.title: Multi-Factor Authentication Requirement
rules.text: All privileged accounts must use phishing-resistant multi-factor authentication. Password-only authentication is insufficient for administrative access.

rules.title: Supply Chain Risk Management
rules.text: Organizations must assess and monitor supply chain risks for all critical third-party vendors and service providers annually.

rules.title: Information Security Risk Assessment
rules.text: The organization shall establish and maintain an information security risk assessment process that identifies, analyzes, and evaluates risks at planned intervals.

rules.title: Incident Response and Reporting
rules.text: A documented incident response procedure must be in place. All security incidents must be reported, triaged, and resolved within defined SLA timeframes.

rules.title: Internal: Data Classification and Handling
rules.text: All company data must be classified as Public, Internal, Confidential, or Restricted. Restricted data requires explicit data owner approval for access.

rules.title: Internal: Employee Data Access Governance
rules.text: Employee access to sensitive internal systems must be reviewed every 6 months. Dormant accounts must be disabled after 30 days of inactivity.
